message:
test(ft-40k1o): per-scenario golden corpus for ft doctor --json envelope

Pins the byte-exact JSON shape of the `ft doctor --json` envelope —
the contract README:86 markets as the authoritative health-check
signal for scripts and CI. Before this commit, the envelope had only
existence/count assertions in `doctor_json_envelope_*` tests; a field
rename, key-casing drift, or status-string change would land green.

## Files
- crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs (mod tests): 6 per-scenario tests
  + 1 coverage meta-test inside the existing test module. Constructs
  Vec<DiagnosticCheck> deterministically and emits the same envelope
  shape as the production path at main.rs:29778 (ok/status/version/
  checks). Version field is pinned to "<scrubbed>" so goldens stay
  byte-stable across CARGO_PKG_VERSION bumps.
- crates/frankenterm/tests/fixtures/doctor_output/<scenario>.json × 6:
  * all_pass — every check OK
  * wezterm_unreachable — WezTerm CLI not in PATH (Error)
  * database_corrupt — schema mismatch (Error)
  * daemon_not_running — stale lock file (Warning)
  * disk_pressure — 97% disk used (Warning)
  * mixed_status — 3 OK + 2 Warning + 1 Error (status escalates to
    "error" because errors dominate)
- crates/frankenterm/tests/fixtures/.gitignore: excludes
  *.actual.json + *.actual.plain drift artifacts.

## Coverage meta-test
`doctor_golden_corpus_every_scenario_has_a_golden` enumerates
DOCTOR_SCENARIOS and asserts each has a fixture file; inverse check
catches orphan goldens. New scenarios without goldens flip red.

## Verified
- cargo test -p frankenterm doctor_golden_corpus → 7 passed, 0 failed.
- UPDATE_GOLDEN=1 cargo test ... → regenerates all 6 fixtures.
- Regression-injection: mutating `"status": "ok"` → `"status": "OK"`
  in all_pass.json flipped exactly that test red with a clear drift
  diff message; restore returned the suite to green.

## Pattern reuse
Mirrors the ft-wvo1p (error_renderer) and ft-nvr6a (search_explain)
golden-corpus shape: doctor_canonicalize JSON helper, UPDATE_GOLDEN
env, coverage meta-test, .gitignore for *.actual.json drift artifacts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Drift artifacts written by golden-test failure paths. The corresponding
+# tracked golden is the source of truth; the .actual.* files are debugging
+# aids only.
+*.actual.json
+*.actual.plain

@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+{
+  "checks": [
+    {
+      "detail": "v0.1.0",
+      "name": "frankenterm-core loaded",
+      "status": "ok"
+    },
+    {
+      "detail": "<workspace>",
+      "name": "workspace root",
+      "status": "ok"
+    },
+    {
+      "detail": "exists",
+      "name": ".ft directory",
+      "status": "ok"
+    },
+    {
+      "detail": "schema v42, wal mode",
+      "name": "database",
+      "status": "ok"
+    },
+    {
+      "detail": "not running",
+      "name": "daemon status",
+      "status": "ok"
+    },
+    {
+      "detail": "exists",
+      "name": "logs directory",
+      "status": "ok"
+    }
+  ],
+  "ok": true,
+  "status": "ok",
+  "version": "<scrubbed>"
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+{
+  "checks": [
+    {
+      "detail": "v0.1.0",
+      "name": "frankenterm-core loaded",
+      "status": "ok"

+    {
+      "detail": "stale lock file detected",
+      "name": "daemon status",
+      "recommendation": "Remove .ft/ft.lock and run ft watch",
+      "status": "warning"
+    },
+    {
+      "detail": "schema v42, wal mode",
+      "name": "database",
+      "status": "ok"
+    }
+  ],

+}

@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@

+      "name": "frankenterm-core loaded",
+      "status": "ok"
+    },
+    {
+      "detail": "<workspace>",
+      "name": "workspace root",
+      "status": "ok"
+    },
+    {
+      "detail": "schema mismatch (found v0, expected v42)",
+      "name": "database",
+      "recommendation": "Rebuild database: rm .ft/ft.db && ft watch",
+      "status": "error"
+    }
+  ],
+  "ok": false,
+  "status": "error",
+  "version": "<scrubbed>"
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@

+      "name": "frankenterm-core loaded",
+      "status": "ok"

+    {

+      "status": "ok"
+    },
+    {

+      "name": "disk space",
+      "recommendation": "Free space: cargo clean; rm -rf /tmp/ft-*-target",
+      "status": "warning"
+    },
+    {
+      "detail": "schema v42, wal mode",
+      "name": "database",
+      "status": "ok"
+    }
+  ],
+  "ok": true,

+  "version": "<scrubbed>"
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
